steps.title: Follow the kindness chain
steps.content: The study found that bystanders who witness a helpful act become more likely to help someone else and can then inspire still others. The blank needs a word meaning encourage, support, or help develop prosocial behavior across a group.

steps.title: Choose the positive verb
steps.content: Choice A reverses the logic by suggesting a requirement. Choice B does not fit because acts of kindness do not remember behavior. Choice D says the opposite of the passage's positive chain. The remaining word means encourage growth or development. The answer is C.
